records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The sandstorm accompanied by the Corruption rays has been dissipated.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The sandstorm accompanied by the Corruption rays has been dissipated.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The sandstorm accompanied by the Corruption rays has been dissipated.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The weather controller expects clear skies without any sandstorm for today.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The weather controller expects clear skies without any sandstorm for today.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The weather controller expects clear skies without any sandstorm for today.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Once again...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Once again...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Once again...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haven't you found them yet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haven't you found them yet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haven't you found them yet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are like ghosts, so it's difficult to find them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are like ghosts, so it's difficult to find them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are like ghosts, so it's difficult to find them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I do find them, they distort the coordinates and flee... This will take some time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I do find them, they distort the coordinates and flee... This will take some time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I do find them, they distort the coordinates and flee... This will take some time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* The higher-ups are asking for information about the people related to the extermination of the C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* The higher-ups are asking for information about the people related to the extermination of the C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* The higher-ups are asking for information about the people related to the extermination of the C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since collecting the C.O.'s remains will take time, I think they're trying to obtain information on the Counter that killed it, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since collecting the C.O.'s remains will take time, I think they're trying to obtain information on the Counter that killed it, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since collecting the C.O.'s remains will take time, I think they're trying to obtain information on the Counter that killed it, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, let's try to get as much cooperation as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, let's try to get as much cooperation as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, let's try to get as much cooperation as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to ask, but please try a little harder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to ask, but please try a little harder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to ask, but please try a little harder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...They're gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...They're gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...They're gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew! I thought we were going to get caught!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew! I thought we were going to get caught!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew! I thought we were going to get caught!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander! Do we really need to keep hiding from them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander! Do we really need to keep hiding from them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander! Do we really need to keep hiding from them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's right. If you just say, <color=#ffd34c>"I am a former Commander of the Old Administration!"</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's right. If you just say, <color=#ffd34c>"I am a former Commander of the Old Administration!"</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's right. If you just say, <color=#ffd34c>"I am a former Commander of the Old Administration!"</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of revealing my identity at this moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of revealing my identity at this moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of revealing my identity at this moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I have done is merely complete a mission long overdue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I have done is merely complete a mission long overdue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I have done is merely complete a mission long overdue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, I lack information on the current Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, I lack information on the current Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, I lack information on the current Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you're right... The current Administration might have a different attitude from the Old Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you're right... The current Administration might have a different attitude from the Old Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you're right... The current Administration might have a different attitude from the Old Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And we're in no hurry! So, let's take our time and think about it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And we're in no hurry! So, let's take our time and think about it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And we're in no hurry! So, let's take our time and think about it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, Commander. Why were you in cryogenic sleep?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, Commander. Why were you in cryogenic sleep?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, Commander. Why were you in cryogenic sleep?

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the operation failed, Camelot arrived and rescued me while I was unconscious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the operation failed, Camelot arrived and rescued me while I was unconscious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the operation failed, Camelot arrived and rescued me while I was unconscious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Terrabrain deemed that the operation was impossible to be carried out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Terrabrain deemed that the operation was impossible to be carried out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Terrabrain deemed that the operation was impossible to be carried out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think they've restored the erased information, but my injuries were at a level that couldn't be treated immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think they've restored the erased information, but my injuries were at a level that couldn't be treated immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think they've restored the erased information, but my injuries were at a level that couldn't be treated immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ultimately, Terrabrain decided to put me into cryogenic sleep until I fully recovered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ultimately, Terrabrain decided to put me into cryogenic sleep until I fully recovered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ultimately, Terrabrain decided to put me into cryogenic sleep until I fully recovered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, no one knew that the Administration that was supposed to wake me up would collapse first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, no one knew that the Administration that was supposed to wake me up would collapse first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, no one knew that the Administration that was supposed to wake me up would collapse first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But them putting you in a cryogenic stasis means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But them putting you in a cryogenic stasis means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But them putting you in a cryogenic stasis means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I had lost all my division members, I was still a Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I had lost all my division members, I was still a Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I had lost all my division members, I was still a Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What they did was understandable given that Counters were rare at the time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What they did was understandable given that Counters were rare at the time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What they did was understandable given that Counters were rare at the time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It had been agreed upon in advance, so there's no need to look so discontent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It had been agreed upon in advance, so there's no need to look so discontent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It had been agreed upon in advance, so there's no need to look so discontent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anila, we all must make our own choices.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anila, we all must make our own choices.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anila, we all must make our own choices.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: You always made that face whenever you fought the results unfavorable to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You always made that face whenever you fought the results unfavorable to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You always made that face whenever you fought the results unfavorable to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, the choices made that day are what led to these results.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, the choices made that day are what led to these results.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, the choices made that day are what led to these results.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You got me out of the city, knocked me unconscious, and put in me cryogenic sleep...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You got me out of the city, knocked me unconscious, and put in me cryogenic sleep...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You got me out of the city, knocked me unconscious, and put in me cryogenic sleep...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh* Okay. Anyway, the mission was complete in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh* Okay. Anyway, the mission was complete in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh* Okay. Anyway, the mission was complete in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>We must go forth. Just like the division did.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>We must go forth. Just like the division did.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>We must go forth. Just like the division did.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... Thank you for understanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, who knew the world would change so much like this? Or am I just getting old...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, who knew the world would change so much like this? Or am I just getting old...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, who knew the world would change so much like this? Or am I just getting old...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I was most surprised about was this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I was most surprised about was this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I was most surprised about was this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A foreign legion made up of Counters. If you told me about them in the past, I would've scoffed and dismissed it as nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A foreign legion made up of Counters. If you told me about them in the past, I would've scoffed and dismissed it as nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A foreign legion made up of Counters. If you told me about them in the past, I would've scoffed and dismissed it as nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not called a foreign legion. It's called a TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not called a foreign legion. It's called a TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not called a foreign legion. It's called a TASKFORCE.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds like the same thing to me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds like the same thing to me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds like the same thing to me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I guess it'll take some time for you and me to adapt to the changed world, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I guess it'll take some time for you and me to adapt to the changed world, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I guess it'll take some time for you and me to adapt to the changed world, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's another problem we need to deal with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's another problem we need to deal with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's another problem we need to deal with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Coming back out to the world after such a long time, we've lost our jobs and our identities have been erased.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Coming back out to the world after such a long time, we've lost our jobs and our identities have been erased.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Coming back out to the world after such a long time, we've lost our jobs and our identities have been erased.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder if there is any work we can do...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder if there is any work we can do...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder if there is any work we can do...

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, let's see how the changed world works.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, let's see how the changed world works.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, let's see how the changed world works.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here. It's a newspaper. You do know how to read one, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here. It's a newspaper. You do know how to read one, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here. It's a newspaper. You do know how to read one, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're treating me like I'm ancient...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're treating me like I'm ancient...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're treating me like I'm ancient...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I appreciate your consideration, but I also read news from a smartphone even then
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I appreciate your consideration, but I also read news from a smartphone even then
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I appreciate your consideration, but I also read news from a smartphone even then
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just picked up one tossed on the streets and gave it to you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just picked up one tossed on the streets and gave it to you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just picked up one tossed on the streets and gave it to you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't have the luxury of being picky when we have no way of identifying ourselves, you know!

records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't have the luxury of being picky when we have no way of identifying ourselves, you know!

root.m_Talk_FRA: You're treating me like I'm ancient...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I appreciate your consideration, but I also read news from a smartphone even then
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just picked up one tossed on the streets and gave it to you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just picked up one tossed on the streets and gave it to you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just picked up one tossed on the streets and gave it to you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We don't have the luxury of being picky when we have no way of identifying ourselves, you know!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We don't have the luxury of being picky when we have no way of identifying ourselves, you know!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We don't have the luxury of being picky when we have no way of identifying ourselves, you know!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem... I'm just saying, that's all. Let's see here...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem... I'm just saying, that's all. Let's see here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Who is this...?
